background_rules: Include lush greenery and flowers in the background
Use a mix of sunny and cloudy skies to represent the changing day
negative_rules: Avoid using dark or ominous colors
Do not depict any characters in distress or conflict

characters.name: Timmy

signature_features: A small scar above his left eyebrow

characters.default_outfit: A simple white shirt and blue shorts
consistency_rules: Timmy should always be depicted with a kind expression
His fur should be depicted as soft and fluffy

characters.name: Benny

signature_features: A small tuft of fur on the top of his head

characters.default_outfit: A simple white shirt and blue shorts
consistency_rules: Benny should always be depicted with a playful expression
His fur should be depicted as soft and fluffy
